title: Novel modified acid compositions as alternatives to conventional acids in the oil and gas industry
abstract: An aqueous modified acid composition for use in oil industry activities, said composition comprising: an amino acid, an alkanolamine and strong acid wherein the mineral acid : alkanolamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 15:1, preferably not more than 10:1; it can also further comprise a metal iodide or iodate. Said composition demonstrates advantages over known conventional acids and modified acids.
claims: Claims 1. An aqueous modified acid composition comprising: - a mineral acid; - an amino acid; and - an alkanolamine; wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 15: 1. 2. An aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 1 , wherein the amino acid: alkanolamine proportion ranges from 1%: 99% to 99%: 1%. 3. An aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 1 , wherein the amino acid: alkanolamine proportion ranges from 20%: 80% to 80%: 20%. 4. An aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 1 , wherein the amino acid: alkanolamine proportion ranges from 30%: 70% to 70%: 30%. 5. An aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 1 , wherein the amino acid: alkanolamine proportion is 50%: 50%. 6. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 10: 1. 7. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 7.0: 1. 8. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 4: 1. 9. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio of not more than 3: 1. 10. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanoiamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio ranging from 3: 1 to 12: 1. 1 1. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the mineral acid: alkanolamine/amino acid are present in a molar ratio ranging from 5 : 1 to 10: 1. 12. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 11, wherein the alkanolamine is selected from the group consisting of: monoethanolamine; diethanolamine; triethanolamine and combinations thereof. 13. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 12, wherein the amino acid is selected from the group consisting of: lysine, glycine, valine, arginine, histidine, threonine, methionine and combinations thereof. 14. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 13, wherein the alkanolamine is monoethanolamine. 15. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 14, wherein the alkanolamine is diethanolamine. 16. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 15, wherein the mineral acid is selected from the group consisting of: HC1, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, sulfonic acid, phosphoric acid, and combinations thereof. 17. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 16, further comprising a metal iodide or iodate selected from the group consisting of: cuprous iodide; potassium iodide; sodium iodide; lithium iodide and combinations thereof. 18. The aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 17, wherein the metal iodide or iodate is potassium iodide. 19. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 19, further comprising an alcohol or derivative thereof selected from the group consisting of: an alkynyl alcohol and derivatives thereof. 20. The aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 19, wherein the alkynyl alcohol or derivative thereof is propargyl alcohol or a derivative thereof. 21 . The aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 19, wherein the alkynyl alcohol or derivative thereof is present in a concentration ranging from 0.01 to 5% w/w. 22. The aqueous modified acid composition according to claim 19, wherein the alkynyl alcohol or derivative thereof is present in a concentration of 0.2% w/w. 23. The aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 17 to 22, wherein the metal iodide is present in a concentration ranging from 0.1 to 2% by weight of the total weight of the composition. 24. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to stimulate formations. 25. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to assist in reducing breakdown pressures during downhole pumping operations. 26. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to treat wellbore filter cake post drilling operations. 27. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to assist in freeing stuck pipe. 28. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to descale pipelines and/or production wells, cyclical steam wells (CSS) and Steam Assisted Gravity Drainage (SAGD) wells. 29. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to increase injectivity of injection wells. 30. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to lower the pH of fluids. 31. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to remove undesirable scale in surface equipment, wells and related equipment and/or facilities. 32. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to fracture wells. 33. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to complete matrix stimulations. 34. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to conduct annular and bullhead squeezes & soaks. 35. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to pickle tubing, pipe and/or coiled tubing. 36. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to increase effective permeability of formations. 37. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to reduce or remove wellbore damage or mediate positive skin effect. 38. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to clean perforations. 39. The use of an aqueous modified acid composition according to any one of claims 1 to 23 in the oil industry to solubilize limestone, dolomite, calcite and combinations thereof.
